summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new features: Connector Marketplace, Progressive Jackpot Monitoring, Export/Reporting, and Real-Time VIP Player Alerts. Backend APIs all working (100% success rate), frontend UI components loading correctly with minor data display and WebSocket connectivity issues.

ui_bugs.issue: VIP panel toggle button not clickable due to overlay interception from 'Made with Emergent' badge

integration_issues.issue: Marketplace grid appears empty despite backend API returning data
Jackpot charts appear empty despite backend API returning data
WebSocket connections failing for real-time events and VIP alerts

issues: React console warnings about duplicate keys and invalid HTML nesting in export page

passed_tests: All 81 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Navigation to all new feature pages (Marketplace, Jackpots, Export)
Marketplace search and category filter functionality
Marketplace connector detail panel and install button
Jackpots page layout and summary cards display
Export page layout with all 6 CSV download cards
Export download buttons present and functional
VIP alert overlay container and history panel structure
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix data loading issues in Marketplace and Jackpots pages - backend APIs return data but frontend grids/charts appear empty. Investigate WebSocket connectivity for real-time features. Fix VIP alert button click interception issue.
